basic_details.job_title: SBI Concurrent Auditor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 821 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: State Bank of India (SBI), Central Recruitment & Promotion Department, Corporate Centre, Mumbai
basic_details.short_information: SBI Concurrent Auditor Recruitment 2026: Get the latest State Bank of India recruitment notification 2026 for 821 Concurrent Auditor vacancies for engagement of Retired Bank Officers of SBI on contractual basis under Advertisement No. CRPD/RS/2026-27/08. The online application process starts on 14th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 11th June 2026. Find SBI Concurrent Auditor vacancies on the official website www.sbi.co.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of “Upcoming SBI Concurrent Auditor Recruitment 2026” notifications for retired SBI officers. Also know the direct official link

important_dates.eligibility cut-off date: 14-05-2026 (Maximum age as on this date should be 63 years)
important_dates.interview_date: By e-mail only (no hard copy will be sent); to be checked on Bank’s website

application_fee.details: There is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for SBI Concurrent Auditor Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official SBI Careers website for any updates. No TA/DA will be paid to candidates appearing in the interview process. Candidates are required to apply online only; no hard copy of the application or other documents is required to be sent to this office.

age_limit.age_details: Contractual – minimum 1 year, maximum 3 years or up to attainment of 65 years of age, whichever is earlier
age_limit.details: The maximum age as on the date of advertisement i.e. 14-05-2026 should be 63 years for fresh engagement (as the engagement is for a maximum of 3 years or up to attainment of 65 years of age, whichever is earlier). No relaxation in upper age limit will be available to reserved category candidates. The officer should have retired from the Bank’s service on attaining superannuation at the age of 60 years.

qualification.experience: Work experience in the area of credit / audit / Forex background is preferred.
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date of advertisement i.e. 14-05-2026. Only retired officers of SBI (and its e-Associate banks) who retired on superannuation at the age of 60 years are eligible. Officers who voluntarily retired, resigned, were suspended, or left the Bank before superannuation are not eligible, except those who completed 58 years of age and 30 years of service/pensionable service (both conditions) as per e-Circular No. CDO/P&HRD-PM/20/2022-23 dated 21.06.2022, who become eligible on attaining the age of 60 years. | Educational Qualification & Experience

salary_details.details: The engaged retired officers will be paid a monthly lumpsum compensation (for full time work) as detailed below, without any perquisites and without prejudice to pension. There will be no provision for house/furniture by the Bank nor other benefits/perquisites/PF/pension fund/gratuity during the contract period. Income tax will be deducted at source as per prevailing IT rules.

selection_process: Shortlisting Based on eligibility criteria, qualification, suitability and experience. Shortlisting parameters decided by the Bank. Decision of the Bank is final.
Interview 100 marks. Conducted by the interview committee. Decision of the committee is final and binding. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.
Merit List Prepared in descending order of scores in interview only. Tie-break: Descending order of age. Candidates scoring minimum qualifying marks will be considered.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the SBI Careers website https://www.sbi.bank.in/web/careers/current-openings. Candidates will be required to register themselves online through the link available on SBI website. After registering online, candidates are advised to take a printout of the system generated online application form. Candidates should first scan their latest photograph and signature and upload them as per prescribed guidelines. The online application will be active from 14-05-2026 to 11-06-2026.

In case a candidate is not able to fill the application in one go, the partly filled form can be saved; a provisional registration number and password will be generated. The facility of editing saved information will be available for three times only. Only one application will be accepted from the Retired Officer for applying at one Circle; in case of multiple applications, only the last valid (completed) application will be accepted. Hard copy of application and other documents is not required to be sent to this office. Call letters for interview will be sent by e-mail only (no hard copy will be sent).
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Brief particulars of experience of last 10 years (assignment-wise details) – PDF
important_instructions: Only retired officers of SBI (and its e-Associate banks) who retired on superannuation at age 60 in the scales of MMGS-III, SMGS-IV/V or TEGS-VI are eligible to apply. This engagement is purely contractual in nature and shall not be treated as extension in service for the purpose of PF/Pension/Bonus and other superannuation benefits. The Engaged Retired Official will not be covered under SBI Officers’ Service Rules but will be bound by the terms of the offer of engagement. The retired officers will not exercise any administrative/financial power during the period of engagement. The retired officers will not accept any assignment with any other organization during the period of contractual service in the Bank. Retired Officers with good credit/audit/Forex background should preferably be a resident of the area where the branch/outfit is located. Only one application will be accepted for applying at one Circle. Multiple applications if received, only the last valid (completed) application will be accepted. The existing wait list of Retired Officers empanelled as Concurrent Auditors will get cancelled with this publication. Candidates must upload all required documents; failure to do so will result in their candidature not being considered for shortlisting/interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview process. Contract may be terminated by giving one month’s notice from either side. Contract may be terminated without notice if performance is not satisfactory. The selected candidate has to furnish a stamped Service Level Agreement (SLA) before taking up the assignment. If any false or incorrect information is detected at any stage of engagement, candidature/services will be summarily terminated. Bank reserves the right to cancel the engagement process entirely at any stage without prior notice. All revisions/corrigendum (if any) will be hosted on the Bank’s Careers website only. For any query, write through the ‘CONTACT US’ link available on the Bank’s website (https://sbi.bank.in/web/careers/).
